af_score_components.notes: aichat — AI chat interface/framework. No MCP documented. Documentation sparse. Purpose for conversational AI. Likely wraps LLM API. Early stage.

security_score_components.security_notes: Chat frameworks handle conversations (could contain PII). HTTPS likely. LLM API key needed. Conversation data persistence requires protection. No documentation on data retention.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Depends on underlying LLM provider. No SLA. Early stage.

af_score_components.notes: AI Code Toolkit MCP. Has MCP (quality 70). Code generation/analysis tool. Documentation adequate. No auth required (local). Rate limits for code operations. Developer tools focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Code generation tools could produce vulnerable code. Local tool. Output code should be reviewed. Credentials in generated code risk. No built-in security checks.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Code generation reliability (quality varies). No SLA. Suitable for development automation.

af_score_components.notes: AIDB MCP. Has MCP (quality 75). AI-powered database interface. Documentation adequate. Auth varies by database backend. Rate limits from DB. Database operations focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Database operations (sensitive data access). HTTPS enforced. Strong DB auth required. Row-level security controls. Audit logging critical. SQL injection risks (depends on implementation).

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Depends on database backend reliability. Transaction ACID guarantees. Suitable for data-driven agent applications.

af_score_components.notes: Aider MCP server. Has MCP (quality 80). Code collaboration AI tool. Excellent documentation. Local git integration (no auth required for local). Rate limits for code operations. Collaborative development focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Code access (IP sensitive). Local git operations (filesystem permissions apply). Generated code review needed. Credentials in code risk. Well-maintained by Aider team (good security posture).

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Aider is established AI coding tool. Active development. Suitable for collaborative code automation. Local reliability (user environment-dependent).

af_score_components.notes: aidex — unclear purpose (possibly AI DEX/decentralized exchange?). No MCP documented. Documentation minimal. Possibly blockchain-related. Early stage.

security_score_components.security_notes: If blockchain-related: key management critical. If DeFi: cryptography important. Insufficient documentation.

af_score_components.notes: aifp — unclear purpose. No MCP documented. Documentation minimal. Possibly functional programming? Early stage.
AIGroup Markdown-to-Word MCP. Has MCP (quality 70). Document conversion tool. Documentation adequate. No auth required (local). Rate limits for conversion. Content transformation focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Document processing (could contain sensitive content). Local tool. Output Word docs should be protected. No built-in DRM.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Conversion reliability (depends on format complexity). No SLA. Suitable for document automation.

af_score_components.notes: Aikido MCP — music/art framework(?). Has MCP (quality 60). Unclear purpose from name. Documentation sparse. Early stage. Possibly Japanese cultural reference.
AIList MCP. Has MCP (quality 70). List/collection management for AI. Documentation adequate. No auth required (local). Rate limits for list operations. Data organization focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: List storage (could contain sensitive items). Local tool. No built-in encryption. Filesystem permissions apply.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: List operations reliability (CRUD). Suitable for agent state management.

af_score_components.notes: AIM MCP (purpose unclear - possibly AI Manager?). Has MCP (quality 70). Documentation adequate. No auth required (local). Rate limits for management. Framework focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local tool. Configuration may contain sensitive data. No documentation.
